# Adam Barnes

> Freelance web designer and photographer in Lowestoft, Suffolk, trading as Platform Ticket Ltd. One person handling web design, SEO and GEO, and commercial photography for businesses across Norfolk, Suffolk and the UK. 25 years of experience.

Adam Barnes offers web design, search optimisation and commercial photography as a single joined-up service, so a website and the images on it are made by the same person. Work is handled personally from brief to handover, not through an agency.

## Services

- [Web Design](https://www.adambarnes.biz/web-design.html): WordPress websites, bespoke builds and custom plugins, and hand-coded HTML where performance matters.
- [SEO and GEO](https://www.adambarnes.biz/seo-geo.html): Search engine optimisation and generative engine optimisation, so a business is found on Google and by AI tools, built into the site rather than bolted on.
- [Commercial Photography](https://www.adambarnes.biz/photography.html): Brand and headshots, events and conferences, product and food, and architecture, art directed for the website and sized for performance.

## Proof

- [Clients](https://www.adambarnes.biz/clients.html): Businesses worked with, in their own words.
- [Case study: Tom Appleton](https://www.adambarnes.biz/case-study-tom-appleton.html): Brand, website and photography built as one piece of work.
- [Case study: Gardner Denley](https://www.adambarnes.biz/case-study-gardner-denley.html): Bespoke WordPress website for a Cambridge property buying agency.

## Photography portfolio

The full photography portfolio, including festivals, architecture and portraits, is at https://www.adambarnesphotos.co.uk. Official photographer for First Light Festival in Lowestoft since 2019.

## Other pages

- [Home](https://www.adambarnes.biz/): Overview of services and client testimonials.
- [About](https://www.adambarnes.biz/about.html): Background and 25 years of experience.
- [Thinking](https://www.adambarnes.biz/blog.html): Short posts on design, search and how websites earn their keep.
- [FAQ](https://www.adambarnes.biz/faq.html): Common questions on costs, timelines and photography bookings.
